name: Masala Dosa
steps: Crackle mustard seeds and chana dal in oil, add curry leaves, green chillies and sliced onion.
Add turmeric, mashed boiled potatoes and salt; mix into a soft masala and set aside.
Spread a ladle of dosa batter thin on a hot tawa and drizzle ghee around the edges.
Cook until golden and crisp, place a scoop of potato masala in the centre.
Fold the dosa over the masala and serve hot with chutney and sambar.
